title: The Big Picture: Houthi ceasefire
summary: A full return to the Suez canal routing will negatively impact ton-mile demand for tankers. But tighter US sanctions and overall trade growth mean that freight markets should remain well supported in 2025. Yemen's Houthi rebels insist that Israel's ceasefire in Gaza removes their incentive to bomb ships in the Red Sea.
